  # Build a more natural sentence by grouping clauses by subject
      subject_groups = {}
      for t in triples:
          if t.subject not in subject_groups:
              subject_groups[t.subject] = []
          subject_groups[t.subject].append(t)
  
      parts = []
      subjects = list(subject_groups.keys())
  
      for i, subj in enumerate(subjects):
